claims.claim: In a deterministic simulation with three tenants—two latency-sensitive tenants with small hot sets and one scan-heavy noisy neighbor—the fairness guard improved mean total hit rate by +0.052, Jain fairness index by +0.021, and minimum normalized tenant hit rate by +0.110 across four cache capacities (360–750 entries, 10 seeds each, 200,000 requests per run).
